rigel.description: Rigel is a Bayesian transcript quantification method for RNA-seq data that jointly models three nucleic acid species: mature mRNA, nascent pre-mRNA (nRNA), and genomic DNA contamination (gDNA). It uses a linked kinetic model coupling mRNA and nRNA through shared per-transcript parameters, and a hierarchical empirical Bayes framework for initialization.
rigel.summary: Bayesian RNA-seq transcript quantification with joint mRNA, nRNA, and gDNA deconvolution
